Skip to contents
XSLmodels 0.2.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Models

Cross-situational word learning models

baseline()
Baseline model
decay()
Decay model
uncfam()
Kachergis 2012
uncfam_sampling()
Kachergis 2012
multi_sampling()
Multi-sampling associative model
propose_but_verify()
Trueswell et al. 2013 propose-but-verify model
pursuit()
Stevens et al. 2014 pursuit model
fazly()
Fazly et al. 2010 probablistic associative model
guess_and_test()
Guess and test model
rescorla_wagner()
Rescorla-Wagner (1972) error-driven associative model
tilles()
Tilles and Fontanari (2013) reinforcement model
bayesian_decay()
Bayesian decay model

Running and fitting models

xsl_run()
Run XSL model
xsl_fit()
Fit XSL model using differential evolution
update_params()
Update parameters of xslMod
get_group_model_fit()
Get group model fit for a specific model
get_crossvalidated_model_fit()
Get cross-validated model fit
cross_validated_group_fits()
Perform Cross-Validation on Group Fits of a Model
get_train_test_split()
Split Data into Training and Testing Sets Based on Indices

Datasets and data structures

xsl_datasets
Cross-situational word learning experiment data
xslData() new_xslData()
xslData S3 class
new_xslFit() xslMod() new_xslMod()
Constructor for xsl_model S3 class
xslControl() new_xslControl()
xslControl S3 class
xslFit()
xslFit S3 class
get_example_ambiguous_condition()
Get example ambiguous condition
get_example_unambiguous_condition()
Get example unambiguous condition
show_datasets()
Show available datasets in the package
show_models()
Show available models in the package
create_cooc_matrix()
Creates co-occurrence matrix from training trials

Evaluating model performance

get_perf()
Calculate Luce choice (proportion correct) for each item in a model knowledge matrix
mafc_test()
Evaluate m-alternative forced choice test
get_tp()
Get true positives (TP), given a knowledge matrix and a gold-standard lexicon
get_fscore()
Calculate F-score, precision, recall, and specificity for a knowledge matrix at a given threshold
get_roc() plot_roc() get_roc_max()
Calculate receiver operating characteristic (ROC) scores for a model association Matrix
plot_training_trials()
Create Animated Plot of Co-Occurrence Matrix from Training Trials

On this page

Developed by George Kachergis, Mika Braginsky, Kevin Liang.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
